query:
SELECT 
  mi.id,
  mi.name,
  mi.price,
  mi.is_available,
  mc.name AS category_name
FROM menu_items mi
LEFT JOIN menu_categories mc ON mi.category_id = mc.id
WHERE mi.image_url IS NULL OR mi.image_url = ''
ORDER BY mc.sort_order, mi.name;
